author: PaulihnoSA
title: Free music
content: Awesome for mp3 collectors & editing metadata tags.

author: Xuba KB
title: Could use some fixing
content: Greetings, I have been using the for some time, until I could no longer copy some songs from the files folder to the app. It show the option to do so but a few seconds before I press the “copy files”, it sorta freezes then disappears. So I could no longer listen to the songs on the app as they were stuck in the files folder. Otherwise I really like it.

content: The best app in quality sound and is amazing and the best things I hope that never change

title: Ever music
content: This app has a great performance

author: ntabaazi
title: So helpful!
content: It just saved my day. My soundbar has too much bass but this app helped out.

author: Dile45
title: Diiiile
content: It works fine now that it can access files

author: Daddy T
title: More than one song
content: I love this app but if it could add more songs to the app when airdropped that would be a real help

author: Makes tee
title: Best of a bad bunch
content: Good offline player, but could do with some polish.  Doesn't deselect online files filter when offline. The account creator loses folder info in smb urls affecting the music library.
